title: British Fritters
description: A delightful British-inspired breakfast treat filled with fluffy goodness, perfect for a cozy morning.

ingredients.name: fluffy
ingredients.notes: any type of fluffy ingredient, e.g. pancake mix

ingredients.name: festive
ingredients.notes: any festive ingredient, e.g. cranberries, cherries

ingredients.name: bread
ingredients.notes: any type of bread, e.g. white, whole wheat

ingredients.name: fritters
ingredients.notes: any type of fritter mix, e.g. pancake mix, waffle mix

instructions: In a large bowl, combine fluffy and festive.
In a separate bowl, mix together bread and fritters.
Add the bread mixture to the fluffy mixture and stir until combined.
Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto a baking sheet.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
